subject: 51st in the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Our children are not only falling behind in education, they're being abandoned.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332439093528693504/-8605025395835467008?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Our children are not only falling behind in education, they're being abandoned. Did you know... • Utah is 51st in the nation for spending per pupil - that's dead last the nation.
• One out of every four Latinos don't graduate with a high school diploma in Utah.
• Three out of four high school graduates were not ready for entry-level college courses. The children in this state have the right to get a better education than this. The future of our community depends on their success. The current Governor has chosen to spend $4,000 less per student on our K-12 education system than the average state does. It's time for a governor with true leadership to stand up to the legislature. I will find real solutions so our children can reach their full potential. **[I know that we can fix this. I need your help-- will you sign on with $15?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332439093528693504/-8605025395835467008?am=15&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** I'm running for governor to fight for a better future for our kids. That means better schools, more affordable access to healthcare, and cleaning our air with investments in renewable energy. **[Join my campaign for a better Utah education system with a $15 donation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2332439093528693504/-8605025395835467008?am=15&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** We can create new after-school programs for at-risk children, ensure that our high school graduates are ready to go to college, and close the achievement gap for our most vulnerable students. name: Katie McGinty
subject: a dangerous path
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-123431050780082176/4098580225628045312?code=McGinty)
---
Friend,

This month, all eyes will be on the Supreme Court (which is still missing a critical ninth justice) as they decide _Whole Woman 's Health vs. Hellerstedt_, a Texas-based case which could legalize oppressive restrictions on women's access to health care.

This case will have _huge_ ramifications for states across the nation. If the eight justices let the lower court's ruling stand, it would open the floodgates for radical right-wing legislators and governors to follow Texas' lead and restrict women's access to life saving health services.

**Friend, I stand strongly for women 's right to make their own health care decisions, and I urge the Supreme Court justices to rule for women's health and rights. [Will you add your name if you agree with me?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-123431050780082176/4098580225628045312?code=McGinty) **

If our country continues down this dangerous path, women who need care will have nowhere to turn. It's time for our politicians to stop demonizing the private decisions women make regarding their own health care and start expanding and protecting access to reproductive care.

**I 'm standing up for women. Will you join me? [Add your name to my petition today to let the Supreme Court Justices know that you stand with American women.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-123431050780082176/4098580225628045312?code=McGinty)**

Thank you,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-123431050780082176/4242695413703901184?refcode=e20160606&refcode2=e20160606&amount=25)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Let's kick off this campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friend --
Today's the biggest day of this campaign so far -- it's the day I officially file my candidacy to represent you in the U.S. Senate.
With the latest poll showing us one point down and important issues like access to women's health care, combating climate change, and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, I want to kick off this campaign the strongest way I know how: With help from grassroots supporters like you.
**You're the best response we have against corporate special interests that want to stop our progress in its tracks, so I'm setting an important goal -- 500 filing day grassroots donations by midnight tonight. [Please give $3 or whatever you can now so that together, we can win in New Hampshire for hard-working families.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4aa/2a380d31/13a27917/f80764/887018187/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzFfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
As Governor, I worked to freeze in-state college tuition and stood up for the right of all women to have access to the health care they need. As Senator, I'll continue to push for bipartisan solutions to these issues and fight for each and every Granite Stater.
But I can't win these fights on my own. Corporate special interest groups have spent nearly $10 million to make sure we don't win this election. With the Senate majority on the line and the threat of a President Trump agenda in the Oval Office, I need every single member of this grassroots community with me -- including you, friend.
If you've been waiting to give for the time when your donation will have the biggest impact, this is it. **I'm counting on you to give now, before I officially file my candidacy.[Please, give $3 or whatever you can so that together, we can take our fight for New Hampshire's families to the U.S. Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4aa/2a380d31/13a27917/f80764/887018187/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzFfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
This team has carried me to today's official filing, and I'm so thankful. Let's keep fighting.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
P.S. -- Hope to see you at the State House in Concord today as I file my candidacy!
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4aa/2a380d31/13a27917/f80764/887018187/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzFfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Rob Portman
subject: deadline in two days
body:

Over the weekend, we learned that Harry Reid's SuperPAC just reserved _another_ $1 million in misleading attack ads for the month of June. National Democrats have already reserved over $20 million in attack ads against me -- more than any other Senate candidate in the country! _**We must fight back**. We will win this race with our outstanding volunteers and grassroots program. More than 1,000 volunteers have contacted more than 2 million voters since May of last year!_ Right now, I am raising money to fund our field operations for the next Super Saturday day of grassroots action. name: Team Trump Virginia
subject: Team Virginia National Training Day
body:
Peter --

We made it! After a difficult Primary season Donald J. Trump is the presumptive nominee. We can’t thank you all enough for the hard work you put in to help Mr. Trump win the Commonwealth of Virginia.
With the momentum behind us, it is time to prepare for the general election. It is now time to go out into our communities to inform and activate our friends and neighbors about the upcoming election. We can’t afford another four years of President Obama’s failed policies, and that’s exactly what we would get with Hillary Clinton or any other democrat.
That’s why on Saturday, June 11, Virginia will be joining other battleground presidential states in a National Training Day. The purpose of the event will be to train Trump Team members on how to recruit volunteers, engage targeted voters, lead communities and win the 2016 election.
We are uniting and will be teaming up with the Republican Party of Virginia to ensure that this event is a success.
If you would like to participate, click [HERE ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Frace-to-the-white-house-campaign-kickoff-tickets-25801168991&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vanationaltrain&n=1)to sign up!
Shortly after signing up, you will receive an email with all the information you need for Saturday.
This election is one of the most important elections in recent history. We must do all that we possibly can to win the White House, but we can only do this with your help.
Thank you for all that you do to ensure that we elect our Republican Nominee, Donald J. Trump, this November.

Trump Team Virginia

info.va@donaldtrump.com

Team Trump Virginia
[http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vanationaltrain&n=2)

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

| Greetings,
---
|
You know **Phil is a leader who listens and learns**. During his tenure as Lt. Governor nothing has exemplified that commitment more than his _Vermont Everyday Jobs_ initiative, where Phil has worked side-by-side with Vermonters in more than three-dozen different jobs around the state.

**But did you know that even while Phil continues his work as a small business owner, Lt. Governor, and candidate for Governor, he continues his _Everyday Jobs_ initiative?** In fact, the program - designed by Phil to promote Vermont businesses, highlight the hard work that Vermonters do every day in all areas of our economy and stay in touch with working Vermonters in order to learn more about their needs - is more important than ever. Photo Credit: Office of Lt. Governor Phil Scott
Working on _ Everyday Jobs_ gives Phil a firsthand view of what it really takes to make different types of Vermont businesses successful, what will help them grow and ensure their employees thrive.

Since 2011, Phil has worked jobs ranging from drill and training exercises with the Vermont National Guard to bagging groceries at Bennington's Price Chopper and making rounds in Middlebury's Porter Hospital ER. **But, he's always looking for the opportunity to learn from more Vermonters and new _Everyday Jobs_!**

Continually building relationships and dialogues within our communities - from company owners to work crews - is critical to fostering an economic environment that keeps and attracts jobs, and a talented workforce to fill them. As Governor, Phil will continue this approach and spend at least two days on an _Everyday Job_ each month, one in the shoes of another Vermonter working in the private sector and one as a frontline state employee.

**Do you have a job Phil should try? **

**If so, let's put him to work! Just contact Tracy at **[**tracy@philscott.org**](mailto:tracy@philscott.org)** to set it up.**
** **
Sincerely,

Team Scott

**P.S. **Be creative, he's the only candidate for Governor who has literally spent his career working in the trenches. He's not afraid of hard work. This is your chance to put him to the test!

body:
This is who Trump really is | Friend --

Every time someone gets under Donald Trump's thin skin, he lashes out. We know that. We expect it.

But I still can't get over what Trump is trying to do to the judge presiding over one of the lawsuits against Trump University.

Trump says that Judge Gonzalo Curiel (who was born in Indiana) has a "conflict of interest" because of his Mexican heritage. He's called Judge Curiel "a hater of Donald Trump" and "a total disgrace." He says that Judge Curiel should recuse himself.

All of that is insane. But this is about more than one case or one judge.

When pressed, Trump says that judges who are Muslim could also fail to treat him fairly. And just following the logical conclusion of Trump's own statements, we have to assume that women, immigrants, people with disabilities, and Democrats (all of whom Trump has insulted!) would also be ruled out.

His comments are racist and xenophobic. That’s not who we are as a country -- but it’s who Trump is as a person.

Thanks,

Christina

Hi there -- If we don't hit the filing day goal Maggie set -- 500 grassroots donations before midnight -- we could lose here in New Hampshire and Democrats could miss our best shot at taking back the Senate.
[**Please, rush your filing day contribution in before midnight tonight so we can take back the Senate, defend the Supreme Court, and kick this campaign off on the right foot.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4a3/2a380d31/13a7bb62/f805ee/2807138469/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
I don't want to have to tell Maggie we couldn't come through for her, so thanks for helping us get there.
Marc Goldberg
Campaign Manager
Maggie for NH
_\-----------Original Message-----------
On Monday, June 6, at 9:32 AM, Maggie Hassan
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:_
Friend --
Today's the biggest day of this campaign so far -- it's the day I officially file my candidacy to represent you in the U.S. Senate.
With the latest poll showing us one point down and important issues like access to women's health care, combating climate change, and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, I want to kick off this campaign the strongest way I know how: With help from grassroots supporters like you.
**You're the best response we have against corporate special interests that want to stop our progress in its tracks, so I'm setting an important goal -- 500 filing day grassroots donations by midnight tonight. [Please give $3 or whatever you can now so that together, we can win in New Hampshire for hard-working families.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4a3/2a380d31/13a7bb62/f805ee/2807138469/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
As Governor, I worked to freeze in-state college tuition and stood up for the right of all women to have access to the health care they need. As Senator, I'll continue to push for bipartisan solutions to these issues and fight for each and every Granite Stater.
But I can't win these fights on my own. Corporate special interest groups have spent nearly $10 million to make sure we don't win this election. With the Senate majority on the line and the threat of a President Trump agenda in the Oval Office, I need every single member of this grassroots community with me -- including you, friend.
If you've been waiting to give for the time when your donation will have the biggest impact, this is it. **I'm counting on you to give now, before I officially file my candidacy.[Please, give $3 or whatever you can so that together, we can take our fight for New Hampshire's families to the U.S. Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd4a3/2a380d31/13a7bb62/f805ee/2807138469/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjA2X0ZpbGluZzNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160606_Filing3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
This team has carried me to today's official filing, and I'm so thankful. Let's keep fighting.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
P.S. -- Hope to see you at the State House in Concord today as I file my candidacy!

body:
| | | Phil Scott D-Day Statement
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dedf0cc91a&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
|
**Phil Scott’s Statement on the 72nd Anniversary of the D-Day Invasion: **

My father fought in World War II during the D-Day invasion. He was a tank operator. On this day, 72 years ago, my father’s tank hit a landmine in France. He lost both his legs and spent the next two years in Walter Reed Medical Center recovering. Thankfully, he was able to come home and start a family. He died due to complications from his injuries when I was 11 -- but he was a tremendous example of independence and perseverance to my brothers and me.

I think about my dad every day -- but especially on this day -- and not a moment goes by that I don’t think about his sacrifice and those of many, many others.

Please join me in honoring and remembering those brave soldiers who gave so much on this day 72 years ago. And let’s all resolve to work a little harder to live up to their example.

Sincerely,

Phil Scott
